content:
Thought I would create a site that would allow you to filter characters better(*) cause as a new player it's hard to find info.

Going to probably add a team builder page and other stuff later.

https://dz-david.github.io/Morimens/
https://github.com/DZ-David/Morimens

Edit:
There's also a WIP team builder page now. The URL changes every edit, so you can save the URL to not have to re-input data again
ie. https://dz-david.github.io/Morimens/team-builder/index.html?state=07,24,51,06;26,09,47,12;32,05,20,48;45,36,40,25;46,02,15%7C00,01,10,11,13,17,18,19,21,23,28,33,35,37,38,39,41,42,44,49

embeds.title: GitHub - DZ-David/Morimens
embeds.description: Contribute to DZ-David/Morimens development by creating an account on GitHub.
